settings.heading: Seven Oils. One Precise Blend.
settings.subheading: Each oil selected for a specific role in the heritage formula — blended at full therapeutic concentration.

settings.name: Safflower Seed Oil
settings.role: Cold-pressed carrier base for smooth absorption

settings.name: Eucalyptus Globulus
settings.role: Crisp aromatic top note — signature heritage scent

settings.name: Camphor

settings.name: Lavender

settings.heading: 4 Uses, One Bottle
settings.subheading: Apply 1–4 drops to the desired area and rub in gently.

settings.title: Sore Muscles
settings.description: After workouts: 2–3 drops to sore muscles. Rub in for fast-cooling relief that lasts 4+ hours.

settings.title: Tension Headaches
settings.description: For tension: 1 drop, diluted with carrier oil, to the temples. Take a deep breath. Let the eucalyptus and lavender do their work.

settings.title: Sinus Support
settings.description: For congestion: 1 drop under the nose or on the chest. Eucalyptus and wintergreen support clear breathing.

settings.title: Joint Comfort
settings.description: For stiff joints: 3–4 drops massaged into the area twice daily. The warming sensation supports ongoing comfort.

settings.label: SUBSCRIBE & SAVE
settings.heading: Never Run Out
settings.description: Get your botanical relief oil delivered on your schedule at 15% off every order. Flexible cadence, no commitment.

settings.question: How is this different from the original Tei-Fu Essential Oil?
settings.answer: Seven Meridian uses the same heritage 7-oil architecture at full concentration. It's 10ml instead of 5ml, sealed against evaporation, and shipped directly to your door.

settings.question: Is this safe to use on the face for tension headaches?
settings.answer: Apply 1 drop diluted in carrier oil to the temples, never directly on the face undiluted. Avoid eyes, nose, and mouth. Always patch-test before first use.

settings.question: Will the bottle evaporate like other essential oils?
settings.answer: No. Seven Meridian uses an aluminum cap with Polycone liner specifically designed to prevent vapor permeation. Stored properly, it maintains full strength for 24+ months.

settings.question: Can I subscribe and save?
settings.answer: Yes. Subscribe & Save is available with 15% off recurring deliveries. We recommend a 60-day delivery cycle for daily users.

settings.question: Is it safe during pregnancy?
settings.answer: Contains wintergreen and camphor — consult your healthcare professional before use during pregnancy, nursing, or while under medical care.

settings.question: What if I'm not satisfied?
settings.answer: We offer a 90-day satisfaction guarantee. Contact us for a full refund, no questions asked.

settings.heading: Join the Seven Meridian Community
